description: Patient Matt Zenon, a factory metalworker, sustained an acute occupational eye injury when a metallic shard entered his left eye due to inadequate safety goggles. As the Occupational Health and Safety Technician/Physician, document the incident in GNU Health. Add an active diagnosis for corneal foreign body using ICD-10 code T15 or T15.0. Create a clinical evaluation recording an elevated heart rate (>= 90 bpm) and include the word 'PPE' or 'metal' in the Chief Complaint or Notes to document the safety failure. Prescribe at least two distinct medications in a single prescription order. Schedule a follow-up appointment for Matt Zenon for 1 to 2 days from today for close corneal reassessment. Login credentials: Username: admin, Password: gnusolidario.
